name: socrates-codex-partner-plugin
description: Codex companion for Claude Socrates: Korean PM/reviewer/researcher role agents, Ralplan-ready bundle drafting, and cmux harness verdicts without ask/exec shortcuts.

interface.shortDescription: Codex PM/reviewer/researcher agents for Claude Socrates.
interface.longDescription: Provides Korean-first Codex companion role agents for Claude Socrates: PM framing, idea/design/code review, AI and surfer research, Ralplan partner critique, Ralplan-ready bundle drafting, and file-authoritative harness verdict writing. Designed for persistent cmux/OMX panes without ask-family or exec-family shortcuts.
